summary: The user is considering selling their old bike rack online and seeks advice on taking good photos and estimating its value. They also discuss car maintenance, including the need for wheel alignment and detailing techniques to remove stubborn stains, as well as recommendations for air fresheners to keep their car smelling fresh.
facts: The user received a $50 parking ticket last month. The user is considering selling their old bike rack online.
